content: I recall some of you have created introductory presentations on OpenCPN for sailors. My groups.io members have expressed interest in an online introductory session. I would welcome any and all shareable presentations (prefer PP but any format is ok) that I could use to build up an introductory online presentation for our group. Thanks in advance.

Hi Dan,
Found this old thread on CSF that might be a starting point : https://www.cruisersforum.com/forums/f134/opencpn-powerpoint-presentation-175838.html

Otherwise you have the official wiki online : https://opencpn.org/wiki/dokuwiki/doku.php?id=opencpn:manual_basic:quick_start_guide:chart_installation (and you can download each page in pdf if necessary)
